text: Implemented portable JDK22 FFM CBLAS backend with explicit given import; override/OpenBLAS/platform/MKL discovery; GEMM/GEMV/SYRK; optimized-family and arithmetic-intensity guards; process-global thread configuration; owned/borrowed NativeDMat with copy-free mixed-layout GEMM; JDK22/OpenBLAS CI; reusable independent-oracle conformance; and copy-inclusive/copy-free JMH. Accelerate focused sweep: heap FFM 98.5us vs pure 182.1us at n128, 401us vs 2132us at n256, 2.88ms vs 14.61ms at n512. NativeLapack was split to gale-v0-5-lapack-ffm because the hardened contract correctly forbids advertising it without typed factors plus a nonempty spectral provider. Full release gate green.
